materials.subject: tznk
materials.title: TZNK Foundations
summary: Work with constraints, order, set intersections, and valid conclusions.
Translate text conditions into short symbolic form before choosing an answer.
Avoid intuition-first answers; prove each option from the statement.
checklist: I can solve A-only / A-and-B set tasks.
I can tell what must be true vs may be true.
I can explain why a conclusion follows logically.

materials.subject: english
materials.title: English Foundations
summary: Decide meaning first, then grammar, then collocation.
For gap-fill, identify part of speech before selecting an option.
High-value zones: conditionals, word formation, tense logic, context vocabulary.
checklist: I can spot a third conditional.
I can choose the right part of speech in a gap.
I can justify an answer by context, not only by grammar.

materials.subject: it
materials.title: IT Foundations
summary: Prioritize exact definitions: complexity, SQL order, protocols, structures.
Most errors come from near-correct options from a neighboring topic.
Recall a short list of canonical facts before solving mixed questions.
checklist: I know HTTPS, queue, stack, and basic security distinctions.
